recommendations.title: Asterix and Cleopatra

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke: The Ballad of the Daltons
recommendations.overview: The Dalton brothers are to receive their dead uncle's fortune if they eliminate the judge and jury responsible for his execution. And to accomplish this task, they must enlist the help of Lucky Luke.
recommendations.director: Henri Gruel, Pierre Watrin, Morris, René Goscinny

recommendations.title: Asterix vs. Caesar

recommendations.title: Asterix and the Vikings
recommendations.overview: Asterix and Obelix have been given a tough mission: Transform the chief's lazy nephew Justforkix into a warrior. When the Vikings abduct him and bring him back to their homeland, Asterix and Obelix must travel to Norway to rescue Justforkix.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Daisy Town

recommendations.title: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion

recommendations.title: Asterix and Obelix vs. Caesar
recommendations.overview: Set in 50 B.C., Asterix and Obelix are living in a small but well-protected village in Gaul, where a magic potion concocted by Druids turns the townsfolk into mighty soldiers. When Roman troops carve a path through Gaul to reach the English Channel,

recommendations.title: The Road to El Dorado
recommendations.overview: Stowing away after a failed con, a pair of swindlers end up on El Dorado, the fabled "city of gold", where they quickly get in over their heads when they are mistaken as gods by the inhabitants.

recommendations.title: Asterix in Britain
